languages.text: "У госпиталя, позже, Вашество. Дайте мне время и не светитесь тут лишний раз".

traits.locale_text: "У госпиталя, позже, Вашество. Дайте мне время и не светитесь тут лишний раз".

languages.text: "At the infirmary, later, my {mf|lord|lady}. Give me time and keep your head down for now."
languages.original_text: "У госпиталя, позже, Вашество. Дайте мне время и не светитесь тут лишний раз".

traits.locale_text: "At the infirmary, later, my {mf|lord|lady}. Give me time and keep your head down for now."
"At the infirmary, later, my {mf|lord|lady}. Give me time and keep your head down for now."
"At the infirmary, later, my {mf|lord|lady}. Give me time and keep your head down for now."

languages.text: "Wir sehen uns später auf der Krankenstation, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}. Gebt mir etwas Zeit und passt gut auf Euch auf."
languages.original_text: "At the infirmary, later, my {mf|lord|lady}. Give me time and keep your head down for now."

traits.locale_text: "Wir sehen uns später auf der Krankenstation, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}. Gebt mir etwas Zeit und passt gut auf Euch auf."

languages.text: “回头在医务室见，大人。给我点时间，您暂且低调点。”
languages.original_text: "At the infirmary, later, my {mf|lord|lady}. Give me time and keep your head down for now."

traits.locale_text: “回头在医务室见，大人。给我点时间，您暂且低调点。”

languages.text: « À l'infirmerie, plus tard, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}. Laissez-moi un peu de temps, et faites profil bas pour le moment. »
languages.original_text: "At the infirmary, later, my {mf|lord|lady}. Give me time and keep your head down for now."

traits.locale_text: « À l'infirmerie, plus tard, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}. Laissez-moi un peu de temps, et faites profil bas pour le moment. »

languages.text: «Luego en la enfermería, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Necesito algo más de tiempo; procure mantener la cabeza agachada hasta entonces».
languages.original_text: "At the infirmary, later, my {mf|lord|lady}. Give me time and keep your head down for now."

traits.locale_text: «Luego en la enfermería, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Necesito algo más de tiempo; procure mantener la cabeza agachada hasta entonces».

languages.text: "Daha sonra revire gideceğim {mf|lordum|leydim}. Bana zaman verin, şimdilik başınızı eğik tutun."
languages.original_text: "At the infirmary, later, my {mf|lord|lady}. Give me time and keep your head down for now."

traits.locale_text: "Daha sonra revire gideceğim {mf|lordum|leydim}. Bana zaman verin, şimdilik başınızı eğik tutun."

languages.text: 「お館様、あとで医務室へ。今は時間と、頭を下げてください。」
languages.original_text: "At the infirmary, later, my {mf|lord|lady}. Give me time and keep your head down for now."

traits.locale_text: 「お館様、あとで医務室へ。今は時間と、頭を下げてください。」
